result.system_summary: This is an e-commerce web application that allows users to browse products, manage a shopping cart, and place orders. The system serves online shoppers who can view product catalogs, add items to their cart, complete purchases, and track their order history.

feature_areas.name: Product browsing
feature_areas.description: Users can view available products with details like pricing, descriptions, and stock levels to make purchasing decisions.

test_cases.title: Display all available products
test_cases.description: Verifies that the product list shows all products with correct names, prices, and stock information
test_cases.test_data: Three products with different categories, prices, and stock_qty > 0

test_cases.title: View individual product details
test_cases.description: Confirms that selecting a product displays complete product information including description and availability
test_cases.test_data: One product with complete details (name, description, price, stock_qty = 5)

test_cases.title: Handle out-of-stock products
test_cases.description: Ensures out-of-stock products are displayed but marked as unavailable
test_cases.test_data: Two products: one with stock_qty = 0 and one with stock_qty > 0

feature_areas.name: Cart management
feature_areas.description: Users can add products to their shopping cart, view cart contents, and remove items before checkout.

test_cases.title: Add product to cart
test_cases.description: Verifies that clicking add to cart successfully adds the item with correct quantity and updates cart display
test_cases.test_data: One product with stock_qty = 10, one user with empty cart

test_cases.title: Remove item from cart
test_cases.description: Confirms that removing an item from cart updates the cart contents and total correctly
test_cases.test_data: One user with two different products in cart (quantities 1 and 2)

test_cases.title: Prevent adding out-of-stock items
test_cases.description: Ensures users cannot add products with zero stock to their cart
test_cases.test_data: One product with stock_qty = 0, one user with empty cart

test_cases.title: Handle adding more than available stock
test_cases.description: Prevents users from adding quantity exceeding available stock
test_cases.test_data: One product with stock_qty = 2, user attempting to add quantity = 5

feature_areas.name: Order processing
feature_areas.description: Users can complete purchases by placing orders, which processes payment and creates order records for tracking.

test_cases.title: Complete order with valid cart
test_cases.description: Verifies successful order placement with cart items transferred to order, inventory updated, and cart cleared
test_cases.test_data: One user with two products in cart (total quantity not exceeding stock), valid shipping address

test_cases.title: Calculate correct order totals
test_cases.description: Confirms that order total matches cart item prices and quantities
test_cases.test_data: Cart with three different products: prices $10.50, $25.00, $5.75 with quantities 2, 1, 3

test_cases.title: Reject order with empty cart
test_cases.description: Prevents order placement when user's cart contains no items

feature_areas.name: Order tracking
feature_areas.description: Users can view their order history and check details of specific orders including items purchased and order status.

test_cases.title: Display user order history
test_cases.description: Shows all orders for the user with correct dates, totals, and status information in chronological order
test_cases.test_data: One user with three completed orders from different dates with various totals and statuses

test_cases.title: View specific order details
test_cases.description: Displays complete order information including all items, quantities, prices, and shipping details
test_cases.test_data: One order with three different products, quantities, shipping address, and 'shipped' status

test_cases.title: Handle invalid order ID
test_cases.description: Returns appropriate error when requesting details for non-existent order
test_cases.test_data: Valid user with existing orders, request for order_id that doesn't exist
